eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Virgin Islands of The United States; at 4:23 AM on AUG 27, 2019 Effective until 8:23 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a required monthly test of the Virgin Islands Emergency Alert system. This test allows VITEMA to provide residents with critical information during emergencies. There is no emergency at this time. This is only a test. No action is required.
